DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.VertexAndTriangleProcessor Struct Reference

This is an abstraction layer between the MeshCombiner and the Mesh. It exists so that the MeshCombiner can use different APIs to interface with the Mesh. It needs to serialize its data with the MeshCombiner so it is responsible for managing the MeshCombiner data buffer fields. More...

MB_MeshVertexChannelFlags channels [get]
 
 Properties inherited from DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSingle.IVertexAndTriangleProcessor
MB_MeshVertexChannelFlags channels [get]
 

Detailed Description

This is an abstraction layer between the MeshCombiner and the Mesh. It exists so that the MeshCombiner can use different APIs to interface with the Mesh. It needs to serialize its data with the MeshCombiner so it is responsible for managing the MeshCombiner data buffer fields.

If we are adding one mesh to a combined mesh, it is more efficient to copy data from existing buffers rather than read raw data from Meshes and re-process it.
